name: Dexus Industria Reit.
analysis: DXI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 14% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.4650, stop A$2.3166, target A$2.9102 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
